title: An act relating to fiscal year 2026 appropriations from the Opioid Abatement Special Fund
summary: An act relating to fiscal year 2026 appropriations from the Opioid Abatement Special Fund

actions.action: Read first time and referred to the Committee on Human Services
Notice Calendar: Favorable with Amendment
Referred to Committee on Appropriations per Rule 35(a)
Notice Calendar: Favorable with Amendment
Action Calendar: Favorable with Amendment
Rep. Wood of Waterbury moved to postpone action until 3/27/2025, which was agreed to
Action Calendar: Favorable with Amendment
Read second time
Rep. Maguire of Rutland City reported for the Committee on Human Services
Rep. Bluemle of Burlington recommended for the Committee on Appropriations
Rep. Steady of Milton asked that the question be divided
Rep. Steady of Milton demanded yeas and nays
First division of amendment agreed to
Which was agreed to on a Roll Call Passed -- Needed 73 of 145 to Pass -- Yeas = 87, Nays = 58
Second division of amendment agreed to
Report of Committee on Appropriations agreed to
Report of Committee on Human Services, as amended, agreed to
Third Reading ordered
Action Calendar: Third Reading
Read third time
Rep. Steady of Milton demanded yeas and nays
Passed
Which was agreed to on a Roll Call Passed -- Needed 72 of 143 to Pass -- Yeas = 119, Nays = 24
Read 1st time & referred to Committee on Health and Welfare
Entered on Notice Calendar
Second Reading

Entered on Notice Calendar
Second Reading

Favorable report by Committee on Health and Welfare

Reported favorably by Senator Lyons for Committee on Appropriations
3rd reading ordered

Read 3rd time & passed in concurrence with proposal of amendment
Senate Message: Passed in concurrence with proposal of amendment

Senate proposal of amendment concurred in
House message: House concurred in Senate proposal of amendment
Delivered to the Governor on May 7, 2025
Signed by Governor on May 13, 2025
House message: Governor approved bill on May 13, 2025
